summary: Test suite provides solid coverage of core MatrixGenerator library functions (cartesian product, excludes, includes, strategy options, JSON conversion, config parsing) with clear organization and independence. However, significant gaps exist: (1) NO TESTS for the CLI wrapper (Generate-Matrix.ps1), which is the actual entry point—missing -ConfigPath, -OutputPath parameter tests, exit codes, and stdout validation; (2) Limited edge case coverage—no tests for empty axis arrays, null values, non-string types, order preservation, or multiple includes extending the same combo; (3) No tests verify the workflow integration or act execution of the CLI. Tests would catch regressions in library functions but miss CLI bugs, edge cases, and the end-to-end pipeline. For a CI/CD matrix-generation tool, omitting CLI wrapper tests is a critical oversight.
